---
title: "Quarto Basics"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
   input["τ(t)"] --> sum1(("Σ"))
   sum1 --> A["e(t)"]
   
   A --> P["P  Kp·e(t)"]
   A --> I["I  Ki·∫e(t)dt"]
   A --> D["D  Kd·de/dt"]



    P --> sum2(("Σ"))
    I --> sum2
    D --> sum2
    sum2 -->|"u(t)"| process["Process"]
    process -->|"y(t)"| output[" "]
    output -->|feedback| sum1
```
